languages.text: "Ксеносекта проникла в паттерны этого места уже давно — не удивлюсь, если запрещенные технологии сами рождаются из ее недр, ведомые рукой предателя".

"The xenosect infected the patterns of this place long ago — I would not be surprised to learn that the forbidden technologies were born deep in the bowels of the station, guided by a traitor's hand."
languages.original_text: "Ксеносекта проникла в паттерны этого места уже давно — не удивлюсь, если запрещенные технологии сами рождаются из ее недр, ведомые рукой предателя".

traits.locale_text: "The xenosect infected the patterns of this place long ago — I would not be surprised to learn that the forbidden technologies were born deep in the bowels of the station, guided by a traitor's hand."

"The xenosect infected the patterns of this place long ago — I would not be surprised to learn that the forbidden technologies were born deep in the bowels of the station, guided by a traitor's hand."

"The xenosect infected the patterns of this place long ago — I would not be surprised to learn that the forbidden technologies were born deep in the bowels of the station, guided by a traitor's hand."

languages.text: 「この場所の模様は、かつて異種族に感染していた。禁断の技術が、裏切り者の手で、この駅の中深部で生まれたとしても、驚かないだろう」
languages.original_text: "The xenosect infected the patterns of this place long ago — I would not be surprised to learn that the forbidden technologies were born deep in the bowels of the station, guided by a traitor's hand."

traits.locale_text: 「この場所の模様は、かつて異種族に感染していた。禁断の技術が、裏切り者の手で、この駅の中深部で生まれたとしても、驚かないだろう。」

languages.text: «La xenosecta infectó los patrones de este lugar hace mucho. No me sorprendería saber que las tecnologías prohibidas nacieron en lo más profundo de la estación, de manos de algún traidor».
languages.original_text: "The xenosect infected the patterns of this place long ago — I would not be surprised to learn that the forbidden technologies were born deep in the bowels of the station, guided by a traitor's hand."

traits.locale_text: «La xenosecta infectó los patrones de este lugar hace mucho. No me sorprendería saber que las tecnologías prohibidas nacieron en lo más profundo de la estación, de manos de algún traidor».

languages.text: “异形教派早就侵染了这里的运行模式——哪怕是有叛徒在星站亲手培育出了那个禁忌技术，我听了也不会意外。”
languages.original_text: "The xenosect infected the patterns of this place long ago — I would not be surprised to learn that the forbidden technologies were born deep in the bowels of the station, guided by a traitor's hand."

traits.locale_text: “异形教派早就侵染了这里的运行模式——哪怕是有叛徒在星站亲手培育出了那个禁忌技术，我听了也不会意外。”

languages.text: "Die Xenosekte hat die Muster dieses Ortes schon vor langer Zeit infiziert ... ich wäre nicht überrascht, wenn die verbotenen Technologien in den Eingewieden der Station geboren wurden, gelenkt durch die Hand eines Verräters."
languages.original_text: "The xenosect infected the patterns of this place long ago — I would not be surprised to learn that the forbidden technologies were born deep in the bowels of the station, guided by a traitor's hand."

traits.locale_text: "Die Xenosekte hat die Muster dieses Ortes schon vor langer Zeit infiziert ... ich wäre nicht überrascht, wenn die verbotenen Technologien in den Eingewieden der Station geboren wurden, gelenkt durch die Hand eines Verräters."

languages.text: "Zeno illeti buranın örüntülerini uzun zaman önce enfekte etti. Yasak teknolojilerin, bir hainin eliyle yönlendirilerek istasyonun derinliklerinde doğduğunu öğrensem şaşırmazdım."
languages.original_text: "The xenosect infected the patterns of this place long ago — I would not be surprised to learn that the forbidden technologies were born deep in the bowels of the station, guided by a traitor's hand."

traits.locale_text: "Zeno illeti buranın örüntülerini uzun zaman önce enfekte etti. Yasak teknolojilerin, bir hainin eliyle yönlendirilerek istasyonun derinliklerinde doğduğunu öğrensem şaşırmazdım."

languages.text: « La xénosecte a infecté cet endroit il y a bien longtemps. Il ne serait guère surprenant que les technologies interdites soient nées de la main d'un traître dans les entrailles mêmes de cette station. »
languages.original_text: "The xenosect infected the patterns of this place long ago — I would not be surprised to learn that the forbidden technologies were born deep in the bowels of the station, guided by a traitor's hand."

traits.locale_text: « La xénosecte a infecté cet endroit il y a bien longtemps. Il ne serait guère surprenant que les technologies interdites soient nées de la main d'un traître dans les entrailles mêmes de cette station. »
